name: Teriburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground chuck, prepared mustard, and Kikkoman Teriyaki Sauce in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Shape the mixture into 4 patties.
3. Broil or grill the patties to your desired doneness. If desired, brush with additional teriyaki sauce.
4. Serve on hamburger buns topped with lettuce leaves, tomato slices, and onion slices.
